title: turnera scabra
intro: Turnera scabra, also known as Mexican damiana, is a perennial plant native to the Americas and is part of the Passifloraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Turnera scabra include relief from anxiety and stress, improved sleep quality, and increased libido, making it a popular herbal remedy for women's health issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
